user.title: Second Brain
user.description: Persistent markdown knowledge store for your voice assistant. A 'second_brain' folder will be created in the chosen location.

abort.already_configured: Second Brain is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

init.title: Second Brain options
init.description: Adjust prompt budgets and consolidation settings. Leave LLM fields empty to disable the consolidator.

data.core_chars: Max chars of CORE.md in prompt
data.rules_chars: Max chars of rules in prompt
data.index_chars: Max chars of INDEX.md in prompt
data.note_chars: Max chars when reading a note
data.llm_base_url: LLM base URL for consolidation (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1)
data.llm_api_key: LLM API key (optional, leave empty for local servers)
data.mcp_url: MCP server URL for HA tool proxy (e.g. http://localhost:8123/api/mcp)
data.mcp_token: MCP server bearer token (HA long-lived access token)
data.mcp_read_only: MCP read-only (hide write/control tools from the model)

model.title: Select consolidation model
model.description: Available models from {url}. You can also type a custom model name.

error.llm_incomplete: Both URL and model are required when configuring the consolidator.
